objective: Add rafka-broker binary. Same shape as gateway. Two services visible in Jaeger.
in_scope: broker/ binary — clone the gateway boot-span chain pattern; service_name = rafka-broker
Both binaries share crates/rafka-telemetry init code
out_of_scope: Peer discovery between gateway + broker — Sprint 03
exit_criteria: cargo run -p rafka-broker boots, idles emitting heartbeats
Jaeger shows TWO services (rafka-gateway + rafka-broker) each with their own boot-span chain
Both binaries running concurrently — no port conflicts (iroh binds 0.0.0.0:0 ephemeral)
Engineer surfaces Jaeger URL covering both services
